body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Refuse reuse of an existing run directory**

In the M1-03 acceptance case where two starts for the same issue happen concurrently, this recursive `mkdirSync` treats an already-created run root as success, and the following `writeRunJson` overwrites the first run's metadata because `displayId` is only second-resolution (`issue-<N>-<YYYYMMDD>-<HHMMSS>`). Use an exclusive directory/lock creation path or otherwise fail before writing when the run root already exists so the second create is refused instead of clobbering the first run.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
